'''Abinyshi''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Inysh]]. 

==Biology and appearance==
They were bipedal, slender beings with long, supple limbs, flat faces, and forked tails.<ref name="Alien Encounters" /> 

==Society and culture==
The Abinyshi were a gentle and passive people that rarely took an active role in the events affecting them. They were primarily known for the contributions to cuisine and literature.<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

==History==
They developed space travel about the same time as the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]] and [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], but their technology was not as advanced. Their colonizations were limited to planets near Inysh. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] strip-mined Inysh for [[kalonterium]], resulting in toxic pollution that so devastated the Abinyshi they were believed to be extinct.<ref name="Alien Encounters" /> Small numbers did survive in hiding, and some Abinyshi joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].
